title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 15, 2024
summary: February 15, 2024: The sea ice has increased again this week, and at a rate of 2.04% (higher than last week’s rate of -0.60%), from the level on 02/08/2024 of 14.308 M km 2 to 14.606 M km 2 for this week. So, we are still in the ice growth season but there is not a whole lot of growth. Plot Compiled...
